channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin climbs past $71,000 as oil shock fears continue to ease
item.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) on Tuesday said it will convene an extraordinary meeting of its member countries to consider releasing emergency oil reserves.

item.title: Canaan stacks Bitcoin, bucking rival miners' rush to sell
item.description: Bitcoin miner Canaan boosted its BTC and ETH reserves to record levels in February, expanding its Texas operations even as many public mining firms reduce holdings.

item.title: CFTC chair highlights wide crypto agenda, including rules on DeFi, prediction markets
item.description: Commodity Futures Trading Commission chief Michael Selig updated his progress on guidance for DeFi developers, crypto derivatives and prediction markets.

item.title: Polymarket, Peter Thiel's Palantir Eye 'Surveillance Models' for Sports Prediction Markets
item.description: Polymarket will work with Palantir on developing systems for rooting out insider trading and manipulation in sports prediction markets.

item.title: Bitcoin hits $71.5K+ local high as analyst sees bears 'stepping in' soon
item.description: Bitcoin copied a relief rally in stocks, but concerns focus on downside liquidity and looming 50-day moving average resistance.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin pushes ‘DVT-Lite’ to make Ethereum validator setup easier
item.description: In a post on X, the blockchain's co-founder said the Ethereum Foundation is testing a new method for running validators that could make staking infrastructure significantly easier for institutions holding large amounts of ether.

item.title: Bitcoin Rises as Trump Amplifies Iran Threats, Fed Rate Cut Chances Fall Near Zero
item.description: Bitcoin ticked up above $71K on Tuesday as Trump sends mixed messages on Iran, while hopes for a crypto breakout cool amid Fed uncertainty.

item.title: Solana, XRP ETFs take different paths as crypto investors pile in
item.description: Solana funds are seeing more institutional demand, while the XRP products are retail investor favorites, according to a Bloomberg report.

item.title: Hyperliquid Jumps on Margin Upgrade, Oil Trading Frenzy
item.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE token spiked as oil perpetuals volume hits $1.4B, with non-crypto markets now dominating its permissionless trading.

item.title: Republican opposition to CBDC could hold up housing affordability bill
item.description: Republicans in the US House of Representatives have threatened the future of an affordable housing bill if it doesn’t include an outright ban on CBDCs.

item.title: Jito Foundation acquires SolanaFloor days after platform shutdown
item.description: The move to revive Solana ecosystem journalism comes after a $40 million treasury wallet breach at parent Step Finance led to its shuttering.

item.title: Kraken's tokenized stock venue starts points program, hinting at possible ecosystem token
item.description: The initiative will reward trading and DeFi use of tokenized stocks as the sector tops $1 billion and gains traction with major exchanges.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Stablecoin market hits $312 billion as banks, card networks embrace onchain dollars
item.description: As regulation advances and institutions adopt blockchain settlement, stablecoins are expanding beyond crypto trading into payments infrastructure.

item.title: Trust Wallet adds real-time scam address checks for crypto users
item.description: Trust Wallet launched address poisoning protection on 32 EVM chains, adding scam address screening as wallet security pressure intensifies.

item.title: CFTC chair backs blockchain-based prediction markets as ‘truth machines’
item.description: Michael Selig said blockchain-powered prediction markets could improve price discovery and public information, even as several US states challenge the platforms in court.

item.title: Fake Police Officers Held French Couple at Knifepoint in $1M Bitcoin Robbery
item.description: The incident is the latest in a spate of “$5 wrench attack” crypto kidnappings that have swept France in recent months.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 Performance Update: Stellar (XLM) Gains 5.1%, Leading Index Higher
item.description: Near Protocol (NEAR), up 3.6% from Monday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Strategy records biggest STRC issuance day with estimated 1,420 BTC buy
item.description: Strategy sold a record amount of STRC, estimated to fund 1,420 Bitcoin purchases in a single day after easing ATM sales restrictions.

item.title: Anthropic is suing the U.S. government for allegedly blacklisting its AI
item.description: The maker of Claude filed suit against multiple federal agencies, arguing it was shut out of government procurement without the legal process required to ban a vendor.

item.title: Babylon-Ledger tie-up expands access to Bitcoin Vaults for collateral use
item.description: The integration allows Ledger devices to sign BTCVault transactions as Babylon develops infrastructure to use Bitcoin as collateral.

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum upgrade path: What BIP-360 changes and what it does not
item.description: How BIP-360 reshapes Bitcoin’s quantum defense strategy, what it improves and why it stops short of full post-quantum security.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor Buys $1.28B in Bitcoin, Powered by STRC
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy just bought $1.28 billion worth of Bitcoin, while Nasdaq is teaming up with Kraken for tokenized stock trading.

item.title: French couple robbed of $1M in Bitcoin by criminals posing as police
item.description: A French couple was forced to transfer about $1 million in Bitcoin during a fake police home invasion as wrench attacks keep rising, local media reported.

item.title: Slumping Strategy and Strive started with buy ratings at B. Riley
item.description: The bank said the bitcoin treasury sector’s slump reset valuations, but opened the door for new digital credit financing models that could revive growth.

item.title: Bitcoin price analysis warns of potential dip after $72K liquidity sweep
item.description: Bitcoin price taps $71,000, with liquidity thin above the spot price and heavy clusters below, setting up a potential sweep of the highs before another dip.

item.title: DeFi insurance is the final frontier of onchain finance
item.description: DeFi lacks its final primitive. Insurance turns hidden risks into priced, programmable coverage. Programmable insurance with uncorrelated capital creates TVC safety nets.

item.title: South Korea sells $21.5M in recovered Bitcoin after custody breach
item.description: Authorities sold the recovered Bitcoin in small batches over 11 days to avoid disrupting the market, according to local media reports.

item.title: U.S. requests October retrial for Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm
item.description: Roman Storm, a Tornado Cash co-founder and developer, has criticized proceedings against him as an attempt “to make writing code a crime.”

item.title: UK Government’s Fraud Strategy Paints Crypto as ‘Growing Risk’
item.description: Blockchain analysis firm Chainalysis argued that crypto’s transparency creates a “powerful flywheel” of fraud disruption.

item.title: US lawmakers probe Trump family-linked firm over Chinese stock scams
item.description: Dominari Securities, tied to Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr., is among the brokerages named in the congressional probe.

item.title: A single crypto trader is sitting on a $194 million bet that bitcoin and ether will keep climbing
item.description: Whales on Hyperliquid are piling into leveraged bitcoin and ether longs as BTC rallies to $71K, fueling bets the cryptocurrency will break above $75,000.

item.title: Stablecoin market expands, bitcoin rallies as Iran war panic cools
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 10, 2026

item.title: Traders snapped up nearly 600,000 BTC as bitcoin dipped below $70,000, blockchain data show
item.description: Glassnode data shows strong demand during bitcoin’s recent correction, with 200,00 BTC purchased over the past two weeks.

item.title: Nvidia's Huang argues AI creates jobs, not destroys them, in rare official blog post
item.description: The Nvidia CEO laid out a five-layer framework for AI infrastructure in his first standalone blog post in months, pushing back against the narrative that AI will destroy jobs.

item.title: Was Ethereum 'ultrasound money' a mistake? ETH down 65% vs. BTC since pivot
item.description: Ethereum has failed to remain deflationary since the switch to Proof-of-Stake, as ETH's price has disappointed Ether investors, particularly against Bitcoin.

item.title: Hyperliquid's next upgrade to let seasoned traders take bigger bets with less capital
item.description: Hyperliquid will introduce portfolio margin for real trading accounts, letting users offset risk across positions and support larger trades with less collateral.

item.title: Winklevoss Twins Move $130M in Bitcoin to Gemini Hot Wallets: Arkham
item.description: Arkham claimed that the transfers were intended “presumably to sell,” though neither Cameron nor Tyler Winklevoss has commented on the move.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs to $71,000 as dollar, oil weaken after Trump comments on Iran war
item.description: Crypto and risk assets rally as the dollar retreats following comments from Donald Trump suggesting the conflict in Iran may end soon, while bitcoin still faces a broader downtrend.

item.title: Tokenized stocks surpass $1B as Ondo, xStocks dominate sector
item.description: Foresight Ventures says regulatory barriers and liquidity advantages are driving consolidation in tokenized equities as the market expands.

item.title: Strategy logs record STRC equity issuance on Monday, buys estimated 1,420 bitcoin
item.description: The company amended its Omnibus Sales Agreement to allow multiple agents to execute sales of the same security outside regular trading hours.

item.title: Thailand crypto platforms freeze 10K accounts in AML crackdown: Report
item.description: Thai crypto operators reportedly froze 10,000 suspected “mule accounts” as new AML checks and transfer delays took effect in a wider anti-fraud push.

item.title: US Bitcoin ETFs add $167M as altcoin funds extend outflows
item.description: US Bitcoin ETFs added $167 million in inflows on Monday, while Ether, XRP and Solana funds saw three-day outflows despite a crypto market rebound.

item.title: Blackstone-owned AirTrunk secures record $1.24B loan for Tokyo AI data center
item.description: A consortium of 12 banks, led by SMBC, MUFG, Crédit Agricole CIB and Société Générale, arranged the record financing for AirTrunk’s Tokyo data center expansion.

item.title: Hyperliquid’s tokenized futures hit $1.2B as traders bet on oil, stocks
item.description: Trading has been driven largely by tokenized futures on equities and commodities such as oil, gold and silver.

item.title: Ether treasury firm Bitmine moves $19.5 million in ETH to Coinbase Prime
item.description: The largest public ether holder sent two transfers totaling $19.5 million to Coinbase Prime hot wallets on Tuesday, though the moves don't necessarily signal selling.

item.title: ⚡ INSIGHT: China unveils new chip to boost blockchain speeds by 50x. An autonomous agent linked to Alibaba decided to mine Bitcoin. Asia Express via Cointelegraph Magazine - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9TaGV4NVg2S2pkcDdmRkNaREVqeVpiWnotMGYtNVhZclZDTEZnSFpzQVphZmg2ZGdKdGVSZThuc3ZzMEhBSHo5YzZsZ1JHYzJZMUlZMG1zenBaYldDRjdSQnNQb0I?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡ INSIGHT: China unveils new ch…

item.title: Sharplink Gaming holds 868,000 ether as price drop drove $734 million loss in 2025
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed company raised $3.2 billion in 2025 to buy ether, doubled its ETH per share, but watched unrealized losses eat through the income statement as the token fell 45% from its peak.

item.title: Wall Street Banks Weigh Lawsuit Over Crypto Banking Charters
item.description: The potential lawsuit adds to existing tension between traditional lenders and crypto firms over access to the U.S. financial system.

item.title: Trump's DOJ Seeks October Retrial for Tornado Cash Developer Roman Storm
item.description: The DOJ is attempting to retry Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm even as the U.S. Treasury acknowledges mixers may have legitimate uses.

item.title: The Bitcoin mining firm #MARA transferred 298 $BTC($20.57M) to Cumberland 6 hours ago. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9vV0l4bnVmY1dmR2c1cWNpRVFxYzlhSDJhUm5oWXloMWhsZDByTG9MUG5kWGZsZ2xCRzZmdXBNYzI4dTRnMjdJMU43S2JDNmxaNzBZSTBzQXRRNDJqQWR6emh3?oc=5" target="_blank">The Bitcoin mining firm #MARA tran…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin reclaims $70,000 as markets price-in a potential Iran peace deal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFB6cmpsOE5ZYlA1cXg3UUx2cVdWck1zcmx3UjJTR0FITEhzUDdVMXYwYmxuMzhXZ1d4Y1oyT2hYaEdCUjFhdlpBNkNFbURxYVAtd2RjazZLYWJINHVqaVR5ZHNuSUNYZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin reclaims $…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $70,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAyQ083MEpyUTVsZVZ2VGFZVUhsRmc0djI4RnR1c0lrVWs4VXJFOXNRcEN1eXNDc0o4MnVjcTFnbzB1eWRhVjJNb2tHVGVpdmUyY3ltQmVEZ2k2NC16XzFBTUxn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $70,000<…

item.title: 🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum leads all chains in 2026 with +$2.1B in net capital flows, per Artemis. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE4wVEdXb0lWTmpqZHpLaTRiNVlIRklvWDgxVXJyV2lfbFlsbVJCS2xsaENlUEdZaFNVbDZmUU5xOUxXMkpsVldkdVZReTVhOUc4QjRJVmllbGFDLS1VS205cEJ3Zjk?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum leads all c…

item.title: Elon Musk’s Grok Faces UK Backlash After AI Posts Mock Football Tragedies
item.description: Liverpool and Manchester United have complained after Grok mocked the Hillsborough and Munich tragedies on Monday.

item.title: Bitcoin Shows ‘Tentative Signs of Improvement’ as Iran Conflict Fears Wane
item.description: Oil’s sharp swing and renewed Bitcoin ETF inflows highlight a fragile rebound as on-chain data suggest crypto market stress may be easing.

item.title: The Bitcoin pyramid is being propped up by $MSTR, which pays an 11.5% yield on $STRC to keep buying. As more STRC shares are sold, Strategy burns ever more cash. Once that cash is depleted, @saylor will have to choose between suspending the divid - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE0ybS01NW55X20zRTJ3aXdsYnZTalk4QkxPMjJYbEdqbVh2eHd2MzJVYnN5TTZPNjNJcW1vRTVITk9GanVsVnZQUC04cF9UQ1d1Ymdoa2RKVTB1NDhKdWU1RWJB?oc=5" target="_blank">The Bitcoin pyramid is being propp…

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation is using DVT-lite to stake 72,000 ETH: firefly.social/post/x/2026218… My hope for this project is that in the process, we can make it maximally easy and one-click to do distributed staking for institutions. Choose which computers run yo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5ZMVhoQm1OX2hUUjdGeUgyakFlaEJzU1ZKQUNkTkszbWRZUVNjcDJ5NmlXdm5IdEFhVWdtZXNJT1l4dW8tQ2VEUzRScEhyU1JTUEtUWWZTVkI3SlJsS01sQmw5R0I2UQ?oc=5" target="_blank">The Ethereum Foundation is u…

item.title: Americans Use AI Every Day—But Most Still Don't Like It, New Poll Shows
item.description: Americans are increasingly using AI tools even as a majority say the technology’s risks outweigh its benefits.

item.title: Moldova's Anticorruption Center Alleges $107M Crypto Scheme to Influence Elections
item.description: Blockchain analysis firm TRM Labs identified links to a Russia-backed influence operation paying agitators in cryptocurrency.
